title: jasminum kriegeri
intro: Jasminum kriegeri is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the Krieger Jasmine or Night-Blooming Jasmine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce stress. The health benefits of Jasminum kriegeri include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of Jasminum kriegeri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety.
